personal.title: Computer Science Student & Full-Stack AI Developer

summary: Computer Science student specializing in Artificial Intelligence with a focus on building intelligent and scalable software systems. Experienced in backend development using Java and Spring Boot, full-stack application development with the MERN stack and Next.js, and applied machine learning using Python. Passionate about the intersection of software engineering and Generative AI to design intelligent applications.

education.field: Computer Science and Engineering (Specialization in Artificial Intelligence)

projects.name: Pyvra - B2B SaaS Website & Funnel Builder
bullets: Engineered a comprehensive B2B SaaS platform for building websites and sales funnels using Next.js and TypeScript.
Integrated Razorpay for secure payment processing and UploadThing for efficient file storage management.
Utilized Prisma ORM with MySQL to manage complex relational data structures.

projects.name: LangGraph Agentic AI Blog Writer
bullets: Developed an automated agentic AI blog writing system utilizing LangGraph and LangChain frameworks.
Implemented advanced LLM integration with Groq LLaMa3 and Google Gemini for high-quality content generation.
Created a user-friendly deployment interface using Streamlit.

projects.name: SpringBoot-AI-Microservices
bullets: Architected a microservices ecosystem using Spring Boot, Eureka Service Discovery, and Config Server.
Implemented asynchronous messaging between services using RabbitMQ and secured endpoints with Keycloak.
Containerized the entire application suite using Docker for scalable deployment.

projects.name: LinkedIn Clone (MERN Stack + Socket.io)
bullets: Built a full-stack social media clone featuring real-time messaging and notifications via Socket.io.
Integrated secure user authentication and authorization protocols using JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
Designed a responsive and modern user interface using Material UI components.

projects.name: Next Word Prediction using LSTM
bullets: Designed and trained a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural network for natural language next-word prediction.
Processed large textual datasets using NLP techniques and TensorFlow to optimize model performance.

certifications.name: Full Stack Java Developer: Java, JSP, Spring, Spring Boot, JavaScript & React
Complete Data Science, Machine Learning, Deep Learning & NLP Bootcamp
Relational Databases & SQL: Complete Guide for Developers
ChatGPT Complete Guide: OpenAI API, AI Tools, ChatGPT 4
